name: Megabeast Investigator Juspion
original_name: 巨獣特捜ジャスピオン
overview:
Juspion's parents were killed by space pirates when he was a baby. After escaping to the planet Eijin, he is raised by a space hermit.

He eventually embarks on a quest to fight the Mega beasts and defeat Satan Gorth. Hetravels from planet to planet until he finally arrives on Earth. Wearing a special suit, he has super human powers and a transforming spaceship.

trailers.title: Never expect to have a quiet drink at a monster bar... | Megabeast Investigator Juspion - EP 1
